name: LLaDA Block
description: LLaDA diffusion transformer block: RMSNorm -> Bidirectional Attention -> Residual -> RMSNorm -> SwiGLU -> Residual
code:
# === LLaDA Block {{_id}} (bidirectional) ===
_lb{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_lb{{_id}}_h = {{n_heads}}
_lb{{_id}}_dk = _lb{{_id}}_d // _lb{{_id}}_h
_lb{{_id}}_hd = {{hidden_dim}}
# -- Attention Norm --
_lb{{_id}}_an = np.ones(_lb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_lb{{_id}}_xn = {{input}} * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean({{input}} ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _lb{{_id}}_an
# -- Bidirectional Attention (no causal mask) --
_lb{{_id}}_wq = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_d, _lb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_wk = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_d, _lb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_wv = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_d, _lb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_wo = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_d, _lb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_bs, _lb{{_id}}_sl, _ = _lb{{_id}}_xn.shape
_lb{{_id}}_q = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_xn, _lb{{_id}}_wq.T).reshape(_lb{{_id}}_bs, _lb{{_id}}_sl, _lb{{_id}}_h, _lb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_lb{{_id}}_k = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_xn, _lb{{_id}}_wk.T).reshape(_lb{{_id}}_bs, _lb{{_id}}_sl, _lb{{_id}}_h, _lb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_lb{{_id}}_v = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_xn, _lb{{_id}}_wv.T).reshape(_lb{{_id}}_bs, _lb{{_id}}_sl, _lb{{_id}}_h, _lb{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_lb{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _lb{{_id}}_dk, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _lb{{_id}}_dk))
_lb{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_lb{{_id}}_sl, dtype=np.float32)
_lb{{_id}}_ang = np.outer(_lb{{_id}}_pos, _lb{{_id}}_freqs)
_lb{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_lb{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_lb{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_lb{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_lb{{_id}}_qr = np.zeros_like(_lb{{_id}}_q)
_lb{{_id}}_qr[..., 0::2] = _lb{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _lb{{_id}}_cos - _lb{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _lb{{_id}}_sin
_lb{{_id}}_qr[..., 1::2] = _lb{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _lb{{_id}}_sin + _lb{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _lb{{_id}}_cos
_lb{{_id}}_kr = np.zeros_like(_lb{{_id}}_k)
_lb{{_id}}_kr[..., 0::2] = _lb{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _lb{{_id}}_cos - _lb{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _lb{{_id}}_sin
_lb{{_id}}_kr[..., 1::2] = _lb{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _lb{{_id}}_sin + _lb{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _lb{{_id}}_cos
_lb{{_id}}_sc = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_qr, _lb{{_id}}_kr.transpose(0, 1, 3, 2)) / np.sqrt(_lb{{_id}}_dk)
_lb{{_id}}_ex = np.exp(_lb{{_id}}_sc - np.max(_lb{{_id}}_sc, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_lb{{_id}}_aw = _lb{{_id}}_ex / np.sum(_lb{{_id}}_ex, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_lb{{_id}}_attn = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_aw, _lb{{_id}}_v)
_lb{{_id}}_attn_out = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_attn.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(_lb{{_id}}_bs, _lb{{_id}}_sl, _lb{{_id}}_d), _lb{{_id}}_wo.T)
# -- Residual 1 --
_lb{{_id}}_r1 = {{input}} + _lb{{_id}}_attn_out
# -- FFN Norm --
_lb{{_id}}_fn = np.ones(_lb{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_lb{{_id}}_r1n = _lb{{_id}}_r1 * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean(_lb{{_id}}_r1 ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _lb{{_id}}_fn
# -- SwiGLU FFN --
_lb{{_id}}_wg = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_hd, _lb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_wu = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_hd, _lb{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_wd = np.random.randn(_lb{{_id}}_d, _lb{{_id}}_hd).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_lb{{_id}}_gate = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_r1n, _lb{{_id}}_wg.T)
_lb{{_id}}_up = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_r1n, _lb{{_id}}_wu.T)
_lb{{_id}}_silu = _lb{{_id}}_gate * (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_lb{{_id}}_gate)))
_lb{{_id}}_ffn = np.matmul(_lb{{_id}}_silu * _lb{{_id}}_up, _lb{{_id}}_wd.T)
# -- Residual 2 --
{{output}} = _lb{{_id}}_r1 + _lb{{_id}}_ffn
